title: SuperCreate
description: Ultimative create fabric and forge modpacks
body:
Hi. This is the best Create fabric modpack. I personally want to create the best modpack in fabric for create. Your support and advice will help to make the modpack better!

# modpack description

This modpack is aimed at creating a better gaming experience with the create mod. Modpack is built on the balance of game mechanics. Although the main activity is to build factories, trains and other development of create and adons, but you can switch to other, improved parts of the game. You can grow a variety of vegetable gardens thanks to Farmer's Delight, go exploring updated dungeons thanks to YUNG, or start exploring space thanks to ad astra.

Experiment with new possibilities and explore new ways to survive. 
Use advanced materials and machines to create chains of production and supply. Create your own, unique mechanisms and ideas.

Modpack is built on Fabric, this is done for better optimization + mods not available on Forge. 

### Will there be a final version?

I think so. I will update the modpack as I can. Right now the main goal is to bring the build to the point where it will fully satisfy me.

# List of mods

Everything is divided into Categories:
 
Create and  addons - full steampunk tech, capable of producing 1000+ hours of content
 
YUNG - a huge number of improved and new dungeons, added for variety, so that the build does not prevert purely into factories and has an element of exploration.
 
Other mods - mods without category

Optimization - mods to optimize minecraft and builds

Libraries and API - just all the libraries for mods to work in the modpack


### Create and addons 


> Create - well, it's clear, it's the basis of the build and just a great mod
>  
> Create: New Age - adding electricity and nuclear energy
>  
> Create: Steam 'n' Rails - a giant mod for trains (I love trains)
>   
> Create: Railways Navigator - a mod for different scoreboards and more convenient things for steam trains
>   
> Create: Deco - I don't really see the point of decor mods, but I can make an exception + a mettal mesh floor is juice
>   
> Create: Slice & Dice - a huge addition creating a Create connection to the Farmer's Delight mod
>   
> Create: Man of Many Planes - the airplanes make the airplanes fly
>   
> Create: Interiors - seats, convenient to use for vehicles
>   
> Create: Diesel Generators - allows you to mine NEFT and make diesel generators to bring democracy
>   
> Create: Big Cannons - allows you to build artillery cannons for democracy
>   
> Create: High Pressure - allows you to create a diamond factory
>   
> Create Enchantment Industry - allows you to create an Enchantment Factory
>   
> Create Air Fabric - great compatibility between Create and Ad Astra
>   
> Create Jetpack - adds a balanced jetpack
>   
> Create: Interactive - huge physics improvement Create
>   
> Clockwork - even more huge physics improvement, allows you to build entire flying ships
>   
> Valkyrien Skies - and more physics, needed for the first two to work


### YUNG


> YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses - improving the Nether Fortresses, makes them bigger, harder, more interesting.
> 
> YUNG's Better End Island - upgrades the center island in the end island
> 
> YUNG's Cave Biomes - add snow and desert caves.
> 
> YUNG's Better Desert Temples - massive rework of the desert temple.
> 
> YUNG's Better Jungle Temples - massive rework of Tropical Temple
> 
> YUNG's Better Dungeons - improving spavener rooms by making new species and improving old ones
> 
> YUNG's Better Mineshafts - improving mines, adding species depending on biomes
> 
> YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments - redesigning the underwater dungeon, making it bigger and more interesting to explore.
> 
> YUNG's Better Strongholds - greatly improves dungeon with end portal


### Other mods


> Ad Astra - Space mod especially for Semyon
> 
> Farmer's Delight - a huge amount of new crops, food and everything like that
> 
> Farmer's Delight Expansion - add-on for Farmer's Delight
> 
> The Twilight Forest - why not put the Twilight Forest in here?
> 
> Man of Many Planes - airplanes do you rrrrrrrrr.
> 
> Immersive Aircraft - shitty, but needed for Man of Many Planes to work.
> 
> JEI - mod for the menu with crafts
> 
> EMI - a mod that allows you to see entire branches of crafts.
> 
> Xaero's World Map - the best world map in my opinion (you can add minimap if you want).
> 
> Jade - shows what kind of block and hovering on it.
> 
> Jade Addons (Fabric) - help in working on Fabric for Jade
> 
> Mod Menu - this is a menu mod
> 
> Tom's Simple Storage Mod - adds a terminal (ME system).
> 
> Dynamic Lights - dynamic lighting
> 
> Mouse Tweaks - convenient mouse control.
> 
> Particular - a lot of cool particles
> 
> Zoomify - zoom in on c
> 


### Optimization


> Sodium - we all know sodium, optimization + a couple of fixes for graphical bugs
> 
> Sodium Extra - Sodium's helper, adds more tricks to the game
> 
> Lithium - optimizes game logic
> 
> Indium - also optimizes something + needed for some mods
> 
> Iris Shaders - for those who want to play with shaders
> 
> Bobby - adds loaded chunks to the cache (for dumb chunks are not unloaded and leave them loaded) 
> 
> Concurrent Chunk Management Engine - chunk optimization
> 
> FerriteCore - optimizes RAM consumption


### Bilioteks and API


> Fabric API
> 
> YUNG's API
> 
> Cloth Config API
> 
> Fabric Language Kotlin
> 
> Botarium
> 
> ImmediatelyFast
> 
> Resourceful Lib
> 
> Resourceful Config
> 
> Geckolib
> 
> YetAnotherConfigLib
